text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is defeated by Biwa<n>Hayahide's
overwhelming abilities in<n>the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Both her loss and the difficulties she<n>faced in
training weigh heavily on her,<n>and she breaks
from mental and<n>physical exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a<n>break from both
training and racing.
